title: September 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 14''' is the 257th day of the year (258th in leap years). There are 108 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Michael Reaves]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[James Urbaniak]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Marc Silk]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Anthony Carboni]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 66|''Star Wars'' (1977) 66]] released.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 13|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 13]] published.
*[[1985]] – "[[Escape Into Terror]]" and "[[The Haunted Village]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 117|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 117]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Wikipedia:Nintendo GameCube|Nintendo GameCube]] is launched.
*[[2005]] – [[Empire 35|''Empire'' 35]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars Insider 120|''Star Wars Insider'' 120]] published.
*2010 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Valsedian Operation]]'' webcomic begins.
*[[2011]] – [[Invasion: Revelations 3|''Invasion: Revelations'' 3]] published.
*2011 – ''[[The Old Republic—The Lost Suns 4]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' reprinted as part of the [[Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions]] series.
*2012 – [[Winston Rekert]] dies.
*[[2016]] – [[Turner Entertainment]] acquires exclusive cable broadcast rights to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' film franchise, including upcoming films.
*2016 – [[The Force Awakens Adaptation 4|''The Force Awakens Adaptation'' 4]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Hunted]]" premiered on [[Electronic Arts]]' [[Star Wars]] YouTube channel.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Galactic Advent Calendar]]'' published.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Jedi of the High Republic|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Jedi of the High Republic]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Bounty Hunters 27|''Bounty Hunters'' 27]] published.
*2022 – [[Obi-Wan 5|''Obi-Wan'' 5]] published.
*2022 – [[The Bounty Hunter Wars (Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions)|''The Bounty Hunter Wars'']] published as part of the Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions series.
*2022 – ''[[Tales of Kenobi]]'' published as part of the Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions series.
